---
title: "Collaborator Analysis"
author: "Patrick"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Exercise: Explore, Clean, and Wrangle Data

```{r}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(here)
```

```{r}
lobster_traps <- read_csv(here::here("data/TimeSeries2.csv"))
```

```{r}
glimpse(lobster_traps)
```

### Question 1

```{r}
lobster_traps <- lobster_traps %>%
  mutate(TRAPS = na_if(TRAPS, -99999))

unique(lobster_traps$TRAPS)
```

### Question 2

```{r}
traps_sub <- lobster_traps %>%
  filter(SITE != "NAPL")

unique(traps_sub$SITE)
```

### Question 3

```{r}
traps_aque <- lobster_traps %>%
  filter(SITE == "AQUE", TRAPS > 20)
```

### Question 4

```{r}
traps_max <- lobster_traps %>%
  group_by(SITE, MONTH) %>%
  summarize(max_traps = max(TRAPS, na.rm = TRUE))

traps_max
```

## Exercise: Data Visualization

```{r}
ggplot(lobster_traps, aes(x = TRAPS)) +
  geom_histogram() +
  facet_wrap(~ SITE)
```

```{r}
traps_by_year <- lobster_traps %>%
  group_by(YEAR, SITE) %>%
  summarize(total_traps = sum(TRAPS, na.rm = TRUE))

ggplot(traps_by_year, aes(x = YEAR, y = total_traps, color = SITE)) +
  geom_line()
```

```{r}
traps_plot <- ggplot(traps_by_year, aes(x = YEAR, y = total_traps, color = SITE)) +
  geom_line(size = 1) +
  labs(
    title = "Lobster trap buoy counts by site",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Total traps",
    color = "Site"
  ) +
  theme_light()

traps_plot

ggsave(here::here("figs/traps_by_year.png"), traps_plot, width = 8, height = 5)
```
